updates.title: NEXROOM Updates
updates.subtitle: We keep improving the experience to turn rooms into complete, visual and ready-to-shop proposals.

items.title: Ready for advanced visual analysis

why.title: Why trust NEXROOM
why.subtitle: A public demo built to make room decisions clearer before you buy.

features.title: Clear budget before buying
features.body: Each proposal keeps budget visible so decisions feel easier to compare.

features.title: Visual proposals that make sense
features.body: Room ideas are presented as simple, coherent packs rather than isolated pieces.

features.title: Built for real spaces
features.body: NEXROOM helps you think through layout, light, storage and usefulness before shopping.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: NEXROOM was created to make designing a beautiful, functional and budget-aware room much easier.
about.mainText: NEXROOM is a project created by Denis Rudenko with a clear idea: helping people turn rooms into complete, visual and ready-to-shop proposals.
about.trustText: Instead of leaving users lost between hundreds of furniture options, NEXROOM organizes the decision: space, style, budget and priorities become a clearer room pack.

cards.title: Clear vision
cards.body: Turning undecided rooms into shoppable, coherent and attractive proposals.

cards.title: Built for real users
cards.body: Designed for people who want to improve their space without spending hours comparing options.

cards.title: Ready-to-shop focus
cards.body: Built to turn inspiration into clearer purchase decisions when the product opens publicly.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to a shoppable plan—in three simple steps.

steps.title: Tell us your space
steps.body: Add room size, must-haves, and your style vibe. Upload a quick photo if you want.

steps.title: Set a budget
steps.body: Choose a target spend and priorities. NEXROOM balances comfort, aesthetics, and price.

steps.title: Get your plan
steps.body: Review the layout, color palette, and furniture picks. Tweak options until it feels perfect.

pricing.title: Be among the first to try NEXROOM
pricing.subtitle: Join the beta and get access when new spots open for the public demo.
pricing.supportText: We are building a visual experience to help you design your room with more clarity before buying.

waitlist.title: Visual beta
waitlist.success: Thanks. We are preparing beta access. New spots will open soon.

labels.dimensionsNote: Approximate dimensions for future fit validation.
labels.placementAdvice: Keep at least 70 cm of circulation clearance around the main path.

errors.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Try a photo under 8 MB.
errors.readFailure: Could not read the room image.

alternatives.cheaperReason: Budget-friendly alternative prepared to keep the proposal aligned with the selected budget.
alternatives.premiumReason: Upgrade alternative prepared to compare a higher-quality finish.
alternatives.smallSpaceReason: Prepared compact alternative if clearance is limited.
alternatives.otherStoreReason: Alternative prepared to compare future buying options.

products.name: Low storage unit
products.reason: Reduces visual noise without using too much budget.

products.name: Warm lamp
products.reason: Adds a second layer of light so the room feels more complete.

products.name: Compact desk
products.reason: Creates a useful zone without blocking circulation or breaking the visual line of the space.

basic.title: Essential bedroom pack
basic.summary: Solves light and storage with minimal spend.

premium.title: Flexible complete pack
premium.summary: Improves materials, visual presence, and durability while keeping budget clarity.

spaceProblems: Exact measurements are missing for fit validation
room.summary: Room analysis ready: the space reads as a {{room}} with soft light and a {{style}} base. The recommendation prioritizes furniture that can become a shoppable pack, be validated by measurements, and adapt to budget.
room.nextAction: Confirm measurements and upload another angle to refine fit, cart, and visual planning.
room.layoutSummary: Suggested layout with a usable wall and circulation to protect.
room.naturalLight: Soft natural light with possible color shift.

zones.mainWallAdvice: Use low pieces to avoid visual weight.

layoutSuggestion.title: Protect main circulation
layoutSuggestion.description: Keep at least 70 cm clear before recommending large pieces.

visualMockupPlan.storageInstruction: Place centered on the open wall.
visualMockupPlan.lampInstruction: Place beside storage for side lighting.

commercialSummary.packTitle: Your room ready in one shoppable pack
commercialSummary.readyRoomSummary: A balanced pack to organize, light, and add function without exceeding the budget.

warnings.measurements: Exact measurements are missing: validate width, depth, and clearance before buying.
warnings.measurementsAction: Add measurements or upload another angle.
warnings.lightColor: Photo lighting can alter the real color of furniture.

nextActions.comparePacks: Compare basic, recommended, and premium packs

problem.title: Buying furniture blindly should not feel normal.
problem.body: Too many options. Too many open tabs. Too many doubts before knowing whether something fits.

cards.title: Does it match?
cards.body: Style, color, and proportion are often decided too late.

cards.title: Will it fit?
cards.body: A visual idea needs a clearer fit check.

cards.title: Will it exceed the budget?
cards.body: The total should be understandable before the cart fills up.

cards.title: What should I buy first?
cards.body: Priority matters when everything feels urgent.
